title: thelypteris pilosula
intro: Thelypteris pilosula, also known as the Soft Shield Fern or Autumn Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to Asia and North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Thelypteris pilosula include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Thelypteris pilosula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
